request_text: Repair moved-target documentation links and a leaked placeholder surfaced by a grounded docs-freshness pass (targets verified present at the new path): (1) README.md identity-boundary-ci-gate link docs/development/ -> docs/operations/; (2) AGENTS.md local-overrides link docs/development/ -> docs/guides/ (fixes CLAUDE.md via symlink); (3) docs/retrospective-learning-loop.md display text + frontmatter description 'explanation/' -> 'architecture/' (href already resolves); (4) docs/plans/initiatives/test_improvement/TESTING_REQUIREMENTS_ENCODING_AND_PLAN_VALIDATION.md leaked 'PR #XXX' placeholder.
